contribution_requirements: Follow existing design system patterns from agen-tools.html. Use CSS variables (--jade, --bg-card, --border, etc.). Support dark mode via html.dark class.
key_patterns: Password-protected pages use .auth-box pattern with sessionStorage. Content sections use .tools-section cards. Header/footer loaded via JS from /components/. Pages link to /assets/style.css for base styling. Inline <style> blocks for page-specific CSS.
